sentiment.reasoning: A decline in operating income indicates reduced profitability from core operations, negatively impacting investor confidence and financial performance.

sentiment.reasoning: Delaying a product launch can negatively impact anticipated revenue and market share, creating short-term investor concern and potentially affecting long-term competitive positioning.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
